raw_consumer_statement: An American Express XXXX XXXX was open in XXXX without my permission or knowledge. I wasnt aware of it and did not find out about it until late XXXX when I received collection notices. Prior to that I had not received any communication about this card. It is FRAUD and identity theft as I did not authorize any card to be opened with American Express. I am XXXX XXXX XXXX and am the victim of identity theft and American Express is not help and taking aggressive unfair practice and suing me for the balance.
